title: Define scheduler contract and timers
goal: Define idempotent local scheduler commands for Bureau reconciliation and health reporting, then provide hardened user-level systemd timers as the Linux reference deployment.

metadata.safety_boundary: scheduler contract first; systemd only as reference deployment; no autonomous dispatch

acceptance.assertion: Each scheduled loop is exposed as an idempotent one-shot command that can run manually, under systemd, or under another scheduler.
Hardened user-level systemd service and timer units are provided as the local Linux reference deployment.
Units and docs specify BUREAU_STATE_DIR, read paths, write paths, lock behavior, timeout behavior, journal inspection and failure semantics.
Operations documentation explains install, status inspection, journal inspection, disable and rollback commands.
